full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Finding a suitable research paper that satisfies all Part A constraints
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Suggest the easiest classical machine learning paper between 2009 and 2012 that satisfies the Part A criteria for SVM, GMM, or Time Series.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: ChatGPT suggested candidate papers and helped filter them based on CORE A* venue, year range, and reproducibility feasibility.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I manually checked the selected paper on IEEE Xplore and verified the publication year, venue (PAMI), and methodological contribution.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding whether the selected paper meets reproducibility and compute constraints
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Does Object Detection with Discriminatively Trained Part-Based Models require GPU or restricted data?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: ChatGPT clarified that the model can be reproduced using CPU and publicly available datasets such as PASCAL VOC.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I confirmed from the paper and dataset documentation that PASCAL VOC is publicly accessible and CPU-based reproduction is feasible.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding the core methodology of the selected paper
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Explain the main method used in Object Detection with Discriminatively Trained Part-Based Models.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: ChatGPT explained the deformable part model and latent SVM framework, helping me understand the methodological contribution.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I cross-checked the explanation with Sections 3 and 4 of the paper to ensure correctness.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Getting help filling the Google Form fields accurately
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me fill the Part A form fields correctly for my selected paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: ChatGPT structured the required answers clearly and ensured alignment with the rubric.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I verified all entered details directly from the official paper page and the exam document.
